transcript.text:
[60 years of tradition passed down for 3 generations]
[Started in 1963...]
[Yeonghwaru, a restauant with history]
[A taste with 60 years of know-how]
[Let's dive into its deep flavors]
Incredible
60 years of tradition is different
[She's so into it that...]
[She starts to speak Chinese...]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Suwon today
I've been told that there are a lot of old Chinese-fusion cuisines here
There's a place here with 60 years of tradition passed down for 3 generations
[Yeonghwaru] [Suwon-si, Paldal-gu] They remodeled this place
[Opened in 1963...]
[A taste with 60 years of tradition run by 3 generations]

You can just tell that it's going to be good
Let's head inside
Hello
It's been a while since I've had Chinese cuisine
Jjajangmyeon is a must
Jjamppong as well
Chinese-naengmyeon?
Excuse me,
1 jjajangmyeon,
1 oyster Jjamppong,
Chinese-style naengmyeon,
Shrimp fried rice,
Tangsuyuk,
Chili shrimp,
This is a lot
[Approximately 6 servings]

-This is all for you? -Yes
[Jjajangmyeon] (black bean noodles)
[Chinese-style naengmyeon] (cold noodles)
[Oyster Jjamppong] (seafood noodles)
[Chili shrimp]
[Shrimp fried rice]
[Tangsuyuk] (fried pork with sweet & sour sauce)
[Order up!]
I need to eat it right away before the noodles get soggy
I thought the jjamppong would be red, but it's not
This looks good too
The shrimp...
I never imagined to be something like this
Chinese style naengmyeon
I've never had it
It has peanut sauce inside

I'm curious
It's a regular naengmyeon broth
Sweet & sour
A perfectly seasoned naengmyeon broth
I want to eat it like this Should I mix the peanut sauce?
After I eat half?
What kind of noodles are these?
Thinner than jjajangmyeon noodles
Definitely not naengmyeon noodles
Incredible
It's so good
The soup and the noodles...
It's just what I like
Something I would want to eat everyday in the Summer
This is exactly what I like
This is the real deal

It's so good I don't want to mix the peanut sauce
Tangsuyuk!
Gotta pour the sauce over it
That's how it's really done
The sauce is delicious
So good
You know why wet-style is good?
If it tastes good, then they pour the sauce over it(?)
What am I saying?
It's still crispy!
Jjajangmyeon before it gets soggy
It smells amazing
It tastes good
Red jjamppong soup
This is it
The owner gave me plum juice Thank you

Plum extract
The flavors are deep overall
This soup too
This is good too
I can taste seaweed-like seafood flavors
Is it because of the oyster?
Lovely!
It looks like I'm here for a hangover meal It's so good
The noodles are very gelatinous
1 piece of tangsuyuk
Sir, when did you first open this restaurant?
I came to Korea from China at the age of 15
It's been about 60 years
That's a long time
I'm the 2nd generation
[3rd generation]

Flavors of 3 generations
[Need a translation]
What does that mean?
I said that you eat a lot
Thank you It tastes really good
The white soup is good too
The tangsuyuk...
It's still crispy even with sauce over it
This is a must-eat in the Summer
Fried rice next
I saw from a blog that this is tasty
That smokiness
The smokey flavors are amazing
It's not good if it's too greasy,
And it's too bland if it's not oiled up
This is perfect

It's good with jjajang sauce
It's on the saltier side
It goes really well with fried rice
Should I try this?
I didn't think it'd be this big And I thought it'd be fried
This is really big Do you see this?
It's so good
The shrimp flavors are very strong because it's big
The sauce is insane
It's like a mix of 2 dishes
I will eat the head too
I'll use my hands
My hands are clean
The sauce is something else
These are the best
The flavors aren't unique

It's just tasty overall
Very standard, something everyone would enjoy
I'm going to crave this later
But it took me an hour and a half to come here
Move near my house I will be a regular
Tangsuyuk is amazing too
How can it be like this?
Let's eat this again
Dip it The sauce is good
So good Gotta eat the head too
I love it
This is no joke
60 years of tradition is different
Is that his old cooking license? That's so cool
Received in 1966
Fried rice is really good too

So good
A little bit of peanut sauce?
It might be good Let's mix it
What if it's not as good?
It's good
I should've done this earlier
It didn't take away the broth flavors
It's more nutty
This is good too
That's really good
It goes well with the peanut sauce
Sweet & sour with nuts
Since I need more jjajang saue for the fried rice,
Take this
Mix it
This can't possibly go wrong

Should I eat the skin too? The skin tastes good too
The skin is good!
It's very crispy
Where did all the food go?
She eats even more food at other places
I want to see her eat more
I have to be somewhere by 5 today
I want to eat more because it's so good
That's a relief
It's a first and last to have a customer like you
This is by far the best meal
Thank you
The skin is crispy because it's fried So eat it as a whole
This is one of the best shrimp dishes I've ever had at a Chinese cuisine
The smokey flavors in the fried rice is amazing
The head

Amazing
-Dessert -Thank you
-1 might not be enough -Thank you
"Excellent" ice cream The nostalgia
The blue and yellow are different flavors
Vanilla and French Vanilla
[Well then, here's more]
It's tasty
Dessert should be eaten mid-meal
This is just too good
It tastes different
If it's pretty average, I drink a lot to wash it down
But today, I barely drank any
Aren't we supposed to give her a round of applause?
Last shrimp
[Finished]

There are a lot of fans in Taiwan
Really? Taiwan?
Will she debut in Taiwan?
[Hello my name is Tzuyang] (Mandarin)
[Huh?]
Hello,
[An intro]
[Let's go to Taiwan!]
That's my first time
Now in Cantonese
[This is too much for Tzuyang]
[Forfeit]
I'm not even good in Korean either
Thanks everyone!
Yes, thank you~
